name: Target Visit Sequencing Optimization
description: A robotics engineer is programming a spot-welding cell where a robot arm must visit 6+ weld points on an automotive body panel. Define at least 6 target waypoints in the robot's workspace (separated by at least 0.04 m, spanning at least 0.15 m max distance) and command the robot arm to visit them in at least 5 different orderings. For each ordering, measure the total motion time and end-effector travel distance. Connect to CoppeliaSim via the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000). Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/visit_sequences.csv with columns sequence_id, visit_order, total_time_s, and total_distance_m. Additionally, save a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sequencing_report.json including num_targets, num_sequences_tested, best_sequence_id, best_time_s, worst_time_s, improvement_pct, and the target_positions. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
